text: I feel a sense of spacious modernity interspersed with quiet anticipation. The first space seems contemplative and a touch lonely—an emptiness that invites introspection. Observing another person at a distance, I wonder about their thoughts, their presence almost a mirror to my own stillness. Entering the next room, vivid colors and clear signage jolt me from reverie, making me feel curious, engaged, and slightly more alert. The written reflections on display echo my own, blending personal experience with an awareness of technological mediation. Altogether, this environment makes me reflective, a participant-observer in a shared search for meaning.
